text.content:
Caitiff

The Clanless

No in-clan disciplines.

Clan Bane

Clanless. Caitiff have no in-clan Disciplines — all Disciplines cost the out-of-clan XP rate. They are also treated with suspicion and contempt by Kindred society. Caitiff cannot claim the protection of a clan and are often the first to be sacrificed in political conflicts. On the positive side, they have no clan compulsion and can learn any Discipline without restriction.

Compulsion

None. Caitiff do not have a clan compulsion. However, they lack the social support of a clan and may develop personal compulsions at the Storyteller's discretion.
